# CWE-353 safe: Missing Support for Integrity Check (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-353-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"crypto/subtle"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/hex"
	"errors"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func ReceiveAgentReport(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return err
	}
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(os.Getenv("AGENT_HMAC_KEY")))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	got, err := hex.DecodeString(r.Header.Get("X-Body-Mac"))
	if err != nil || subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(expected, got) != 1 {
		return errors.New("integrity check failed")
	}
	_, err = db.Exec("INSERT INTO agent_reports (payload) VALUES (?)", string(body))
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted)
	return nil
}
